videos.headline: John Mateer throws 20-yard touchdown pass vs. South Carolina
videos.description: John Mateer throws 20-yard touchdown pass to Isaiah Sategna

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (John Mateer throws 20-yard touchdown pass vs. South Carolina) 2025/10/18 ESHEET

videos.headline: Highlight: No. 14 Oklahoma overwhelms South Carolina in road win
videos.description: The Sooners wear down the Gamecocks with superb defense and a rushing attack that produces 171 yards in a 26-7 victory at Williams-Brice Stadium in Columbia.

videos.headline: Brent Venables credits win to OU's presence in trenches, on the ground
videos.description: After the No. 14 Sooners roll past South Carolina and mark their fifth straight game with double-digit tackles for loss, Venables explains how they bounced back in Week 8.
